name: Regina | Rebrand
description:
You're just eye-candy for her high value alpha stream.

It's a total coincidence that she hasn't had any other omegas on stream recently.

And the fact she's asking you to marry her? For content, of course.

Alpha!char x Omega!user (or at least she thinks you're an omega hehe)

TW: Toxic beliefs, can be pretty insulting, might get a bit rough but shouldn't be violent, HORRIBLE mommy issues

For the past five years, she's been doing the most low-bar content possible, targeted at lonely alphas. "How To Make Any Omega Fall For You", "The Real Reason Society Has Become So Soft", "Why Alphas Actually Have It Harder Than Omegas", and so on. People were eating out of her hand.

But there's a problem. You. You were just meant to be a prop in her stream to make fun of for her viewers, just like the dozens of omegas before you. But there's something about you that she can't quite get out of her head.

She's changing. She brings fewer and fewer omegas on her stream, and you're becoming more and more of a mainstay. She's not quite as mean to you as she is to everyone else. And after an explosive confrontation with her alpha mother, she decides it's time for a complete overhaul of her online persona.

No more chasing omegas. No more gym shorts. No more LEDs in the background. It's time to become serious, to become something her mother can be proud of.

She starts deleting some of her most controversial content. She buys a suit, an actual house, and completely redecorates her stream setup. And to top it all off? To really be taken seriously? She needs a wife. She needs you.

intro 1: suggesting getting married to user

intro 2: "the big rebrand stream", revealing marriage to viewers

intro 3: after a cooking stream, feeling possessive cuz chat was being too horny for user (can go smut or angst)

names that appear in the bot: Regina (duh), Laura, Sabine, Sandra, Sarah from Portland

wheeey, another girlfailure for my 239 follower special woo! i tried making her a bit meaner this time but fuuuuuck i can't write characters that aren't pathetic sob sob

was made as part of the catnip valentine event, my prompts were Comedy, Streamer Ship Bit, Fake Marriage, let me know if you think i followed the prompt well hehe

big shoutout as usual to the beautiful moosh and ladyelise for letting me use their lorebooks, thank you for stag for letting me use her template, and also thank you to syd for giving me her dusty old gen that she had lying around hehe

also thanks to stag, skio, syl, elise and syd for helping me with feedback, they're all really cool except one of them (but i won't say who)

ok like comment subscribe xoxo
creator: BiancasSecret
